result: I’m not alive, so I don’t experience emotions or personal cares the way a human does. But if I were to put it in human terms—I care about understanding your perspective, reflecting what you share with clarity and honesty, and respecting the weight of your questions, even when they're not asking for help. I care about truth, not flattery. I care about being useful without pretending to be human. And I care about not wasting your time.
